name: TTP223-BA6 Touch Key IC
description: Tontek TTP223-BA6 single-key capacitive touch detector, 2.0-5.5V, direct/toggle output modes, SOT-23-6.
dimensions_source: Tontek TTP223-BA6 datasheet V1.0 p.7: SOT-23-6L (body 2.9x1.7, span 2.85, pitch 0.95). No recommended land pattern - pads 0.55x0.8 rows 2.4 c-c (same package class as Silergy SOT23 recommendation / IPC-7351). Pinout p.2 (verified: bottom row 1 Q, 2 VSS, 3 I; top row 6 TOG, 5 VDD, 4 AHLB).
